all.en: Proposal document presented to the Pricing Committee, April ninth
all.zh: 提交定價委員會的提案文件，日期為四月九日

all.en: Prepared by Tanya Wexler, senior product manager for consumer audio
all.zh: 由消費音訊資深產品經理 Tanya Wexler 撰寫

all.en: Subject: Q2 Promotional Bundle Pricing Strategy for North America
all.zh: 主旨：北美 Q2 組合定價促銷策略

all.en: Executive summary opens the document with three key recommendations
all.zh: 執行摘要以三項關鍵建議開場

all.en: First, launch a tiered bundle structure across three price points
all.zh: 第一，推出三層價位的階梯式組合

all.en: Second, position bundles as gift-ready ahead of Mother's Day weekend
all.zh: 第二，於母親節週末前將組合定位為禮品包裝

all.en: Third, support the launch with co-funded retail end-cap displays
all.zh: 第三，以共同出資的零售端架展示支援上市

all.en: The market context section reviews competitive promotional activity
all.zh: 市場背景章節回顧競爭對手促銷活動

all.en: Two major competitors ran aggressive bundle campaigns last quarter
all.zh: 兩大主要競爭對手上季推出積極的組合活動

all.en: Their average bundle discount ranged between twenty and twenty-five percent
all.zh: 其組合折扣平均介於百分之二十到二十五

all.en: Our pricing data shows we lost roughly four points of market share
all.zh: 我方定價資料顯示我們流失約四個百分點市占率

all.en: Recovering that share is the primary commercial objective of this proposal
all.zh: 奪回該市占率為本提案的首要商業目標

all.en: Tanya proposes three bundle tiers labeled Essentials, Premier, and Studio
all.zh: Tanya 建議三個組合層級命名為精選、尊享與工作室

all.en: The Essentials bundle pairs our entry headphones with a charging stand
all.zh: 精選組合搭配入門款耳機與充電座

all.en: Suggested retail price is ninety-nine dollars, down from one twenty-five
all.zh: 建議零售價九十九美元，原價一百二十五美元

all.en: That represents a twenty-one percent effective discount versus separate purchase
all.zh: 相當於單買的有效折扣百分之二十一

all.en: The Premier bundle includes wireless earbuds, case, and a portable speaker
all.zh: 尊享組合包括無線耳塞、收納盒與可攜式喇叭

all.en: Suggested price is one ninety-nine, reduced from a two-forty list
all.zh: 建議價一百九十九美元，原訂價二百四十美元

all.en: Margin remains at thirty-six percent after promotional cost allocation
all.zh: 扣除促銷成本後毛利仍維持百分之三十六

all.en: The Studio bundle targets enthusiasts with reference headphones and a DAC
all.zh: 工作室組合鎖定愛好者，配備參考級耳機與 DAC

all.en: Suggested price is four ninety-nine, a fifteen percent bundle discount
all.zh: 建議價四百九十九美元，組合折扣百分之十五

all.en: Studio tier preserves brand premium positioning despite the bundle savings
all.zh: 工作室層級雖有組合優惠仍保有品牌高端定位

all.en: Volume forecasts assume thirty thousand bundles sold across all tiers
all.zh: 銷量預測假設三層合計售出三萬組

all.en: Essentials projects twenty thousand units based on prior promotional lift
all.zh: 精選組依過往促銷拉抬預測兩萬組

all.en: Premier projects seven thousand units with strong gift-occasion appeal
all.zh: 尊享組預測七千組，具強烈禮品場合吸引力

all.en: Studio projects three thousand units, limited by enthusiast segment size
all.zh: 工作室組預測三千組，受愛好者客群規模限制

all.en: Total incremental revenue projects at six point two million dollars
all.zh: 增量總營收預估為六百二十萬美元

all.en: Gross profit contribution is calculated at two point three million
all.zh: 毛利貢獻計算為兩百三十萬美元

all.en: Promotional spending requested totals four hundred thousand dollars
all.zh: 申請的促銷支出總計四十萬美元

all.en: Of that, two hundred fifty thousand funds retail end-cap placement
all.zh: 其中二十五萬美元用於零售端架曝光

all.en: One hundred thousand supports digital advertising across three platforms
all.zh: 十萬美元支援三大平台的數位廣告

all.en: Fifty thousand covers in-store demonstration staffing on weekends
all.zh: 五萬美元支應週末店內示範人員費用

all.en: Return on promotional investment is projected at four point seven times
all.zh: 促銷投資報酬率預估為四點七倍

all.en: Risk analysis identifies three primary scenarios for committee consideration
all.zh: 風險分析提出三大主要情境供委員會考量

all.en: Scenario one is competitive response with deeper discounts on similar bundles
all.zh: 情境一為競爭對手以更深折扣推出類似組合反擊

all.en: Mitigation includes maintaining a fifteen percent price advantage buffer
all.zh: 緩解措施包括維持百分之十五的價格優勢緩衝

all.en: Scenario two is supply constraint on the wireless earbuds component
all.zh: 情境二為無線耳塞元件的供應受限

all.en: Mitigation involves pre-positioning eighty percent of inventory by May first
all.zh: 緩解措施為五月一日前預先佈署百分之八十庫存

all.en: Scenario three is softer demand due to broader macroeconomic headwinds
all.zh: 情境三為總體經濟逆風造成需求疲軟

all.en: Mitigation includes a midcourse correction trigger at the four-week mark
all.zh: 緩解措施包括四週時啟動中期修正

all.en: If sell-through tracks below seventy percent of plan, additional levers activate
all.zh: 若實銷率低於計畫七成將啟動額外手段

all.en: Levers include free shipping promotions and targeted email rebates
all.zh: 手段包括免運費促銷與精準電郵回饋金

all.en: Channel partner support has been pre-aligned with three top retailers
all.zh: 通路夥伴支援已與三大零售商預先對齊

all.en: Each retailer has committed to feature placement in their April flyers
all.zh: 每家零售商已承諾於四月傳單中刊登主打位置

all.en: Direct-to-consumer website will host a dedicated bundle landing page
all.zh: 官網將設置專屬組合著陸頁

all.en: The page goes live April twenty-fifth with early access for loyalty members
all.zh: 頁面四月二十五日上線，會員享搶先體驗

all.en: Loyalty members receive an additional five percent stack-eligible discount
all.zh: 會員另享百分之五可疊加折扣

all.en: Customer experience guardrails ensure clear bundle terms at checkout
all.zh: 客戶體驗護欄確保結帳時組合條款清楚

all.en: Returns policy applies to the bundle as a single SKU, not individual items
all.zh: 退貨政策將組合視為單一料號，不適用個別品項

all.en: Communications team will publish FAQ content for support agents
all.zh: 傳播團隊將為支援人員發布常見問題集

all.en: Training sessions for store associates are scheduled for April fifteenth
all.zh: 店員培訓場次排定於四月十五日

all.en: The proposal requests committee approval no later than April sixteenth
all.zh: 本提案請委員會於四月十六日前核准

all.en: Earlier approval enables tighter execution and printing lead times
all.zh: 提早核准可使執行更緊湊並爭取印刷前置時間

all.en: Tanya welcomes questions and alternative pricing structure suggestions
all.zh: Tanya 歡迎提問並接受替代定價架構建議

all.en: Thank you for your consideration of this Q2 bundle pricing proposal
all.zh: 感謝考量此 Q2 組合定價提案
